fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, often used as a hedging tool or a surrogate for put options on the S&P 500. Recent articles discuss its role in uncertain times and its potential for short-term trading, but none provide specific forward-looking catalysts or recent performance data. The nature of the ETF suggests its performance is highly correlated with market downturns and increased volatility.
